profile.summary: I build products at the intersection of technology, research, and execution. My work spans academic exploration, product strategy, and hands-on delivery, with a focus on turning ideas into useful systems and clear user value.
profile.channelsIntro: These are the platforms I actively use across China and global communities for writing, videos, short updates, and academic visibility.

socialProfiles.label: Bilibili
socialProfiles.note: Videos, talks, demos, and longer-form public content

socialProfiles.label: Xiaohongshu
socialProfiles.note: Short visual posts, product notes, and personal brand content

socialProfiles.label: WeChat Official Account
socialProfiles.note: Long-form writing, essays, and official updates

socialProfiles.label: Zhihu
socialProfiles.note: Long-form answers, commentary, and professional thought pieces

socialProfiles.label: Weibo
socialProfiles.note: Short updates, announcements, and public interactions

socialProfiles.label: X
socialProfiles.note: Short-form thoughts, links, and public discussion

socialProfiles.label: YouTube
socialProfiles.note: Talks, demos, lectures, and recorded appearances

socialProfiles.label: Instagram
socialProfiles.note: Visual storytelling, behind-the-scenes moments, and public identity

socialProfiles.label: GitHub
socialProfiles.note: Code, open-source work, and technical projects

publications.intro: Publication entries are stored in JSON for now so the site stays stable on GitHub Pages, while the schema remains ready for future Google Scholar automation.
publications.sourceNote: Use this section for papers, preprints, patents, or academic outputs. The structure matches what you would usually showcase from a Google Scholar profile.
